name: Dog Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cracked wheat, or wheat germ
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg with 1 tbsp milk.
2. Dissolve the yeast in 1/4 cup warm water and add to the chicken stock.
3. Combine all the dry ingredients and add the chicken stock mixture.
4. Knead on a floured surface for about 3 minutes until a stiff dough forms.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Cut into bars or using a cookie cutter.
6. Brush with egg/milk wash and place on cookie sheets.
7. Bake in a 300 degree oven for about 45 minutes. Turn off the heat and leave biscuits in the oven overnight.
Makes 4 to 5 dozen bars.
